title: Electronic and Precision Equipment Repair and Maintenance

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 81121 ($8,330,003,965) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 81121 ($22,279,701,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: ancestor 81121. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_total.source: QCEW 2024 private annual avg establishments (SUSB out of scope for this code; establishments are a proxy for firms — overcounts multi-unit firms)

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[81]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $210,679 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 81121); DATA GAP: no SUSB size-class data for this code; n_band could not be computed — the research run must supply it with a shown chain, quality ESTIMATE
